description: Full-size calendar view displaying a month grid with event entries, highlighted dates, and click handlers for both dates and events. Suitable for scheduling UIs.

examples.title: Calendar view with highlighted dates and constraints
examples.code:
<TmCalendarView SelectedDate="@selectedDate"
                Events="@events"
                HighlightedDates="@importantDates"
                MinDate="@(new DateOnly(2026, 1, 1))"
                MaxDate="@(new DateOnly(2026, 12, 31))"
                OnDateClick="HandleDateClick" />
